parameters.sink_construction: 16 structured phase paths per t: 4 offsets (2 random + negations) x 4 lanes of per-step-permuted quartet {0,pi/2,pi,3pi/2}; negation-symmetric set; shared across bases and both sink configs; 250 shots each, pooled per (t, basis)

selection_rule.ranking: uniformity = minT2/maxT2 desc, tie-break minT2 desc

parameters.noise_model: T2echo_vs_T2star (Ramsey ratios); sink = literal frozen RZ paths [sim + hardware]
